title: C0M, Okeanos released from Evil Geniuses
description: The former LEVIATÁN duo have departed Evil Geniuses after almost two months on the bench.
author: ChickenJoe

title: BBL, NRG continue EWC 2026 journey to playoffs
description: Both BBL Esports and NRG won their first two 1-1 games of the Esports World Cup 2026 group stage, eliminating EDward Gaming and Karmine Corp.
author: weivy

title: Wolves releases jowa
description: After just Kickoff and Stage 1, Wolves parts ways with jowa.
author: jenopelle

title: DH returns to T1's main roster
author: jenopelle

title: Wolves completes its roster with Deryeon
description: The wolfpack is complete ahead of China Stage 2.
author: jenopelle

title: Heretics, Gentle Mates qualify from EWC 2026 groups
description: Team Heretics and Gentle Mates won their qualification matches for the Esports World Cup 2026 playoffs, while G2 Esports and All Gamers remained alive in groups.
author: weivy

title: 100 Thieves, Vitality secure EWC's first playoff slots
description: The Thieves and the Bees looked impressive, securing playoff spots in EWC26.
author: jenopelle

title: New bird, same talons: FrosT joins FULL SENSE
description: FULL SENSE hosts a TALON reunion, with FrosT pairing up with some familiar faces on the Thai squad.
author: jenopelle

title: cb reunites with Nova Esports
description: cb makes his return to Nova after departing EDG.
author: raezeri

title: EMEA remains on top for day two of EWC 2026
description: Both EMEA teams won, while MIBR swept Global handily and Nongshim continued to win over G2 Esports on the second day of the Esports World Cup 2026.
author: weivy

title: FULL SENSE benches Leviathan, calls seph1roth into action
description: A substitution for FULL SENSE, with one original member making way for another.
author: jenopelle

title: Nongshim RedForce signs 2011-born prospect WoohyuN
description: An up-and-coming name signs with Nongshim RedForce.
author: jenopelle

title: Americas and EMEA open strong at EWC
description: Day one of EWC wrapped up with Americas and EMEA starting the event strong.
author: jenopelle

title: FURIA completes Stage 2 roster with Shyy
description: The Chilean Sentinel returns to the Americas League after half a year of VCL play.
author: ChickenJoe

title: EDward Gaming releases cb
description: After competing in just two events for the team, cb is released by EDG.
author: jenopelle
